---
ID: US-CMP-FE-1201
Title: Unified campaign workspace shell with persistent header
Status: Not Started
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-1201
Epic: CMP-PAR-E1: Workspace IA and Context Integrity
---

As a campaign operator
I want every campaign view to keep one persistent campaign header and tab navigation
So I always know campaign context while switching between workflows

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Campaign workspace uses one persistent header across Overview, Content, Review Queue, Calendar, Reminders, and Reporting.
- [ ] Header includes campaign name, status, owner, date range, channels, and key operational metrics.
- [ ] Switching workspace tabs retains campaign context and selected campaign identity.
- [ ] All workspace tabs use the same container width, spacing, and structural rhythm.
- [ ] Sidebar links resolve to route-backed campaign subpages and preserve active-state highlighting.
- [ ] Mobile and tablet layouts keep header context visible without clipping or duplicate controls.
